title: Crab Crusted Tilapia
ingredients: 2 tbsp Italian bread crumbs with Romano Cheese
¼ jalapeno pepper, seeded and minced
2 heaping tbsp. of shredded mozzarella cheese
instructions:
Preheat the oven to 375°
In a medium bowl combine all the ingredients except the Tilapia.
Arrange the Tilapia in a single layer on foil cookie sheet. Spread the crab and crumb stuffing mixture evenly over the top of the fish.
Bake for about 20 minutes or until the fish flakes. Turn the oven to broil and lightly brown the topping before removing from the oven.
